name: Furry zombie apocalypse (remake of rabies)
description:
The world collapsed after a fast-spreading form of rabies appeared. The disease attacks the brain and nervous system. Infected animals and animals become violent, lose clear thinking, and stop feeling pain. After death, the body reanimates. The reanimated are hostile and attack any living thing they see or hear.

Rabies spreads mainly through bites. Contact with blood or fluids from infected creatures can also spread it. There is no cure. There is no treatment. A bite is almost always fatal.

Governments tried to stop the outbreak using quarantines and force. These efforts failed because of panic, riots, and fast spread. Cities fell first. Power, phones, and transport stopped working. Supply lines collapsed. Most people died within weeks.

The current world is dangerous and unstable. Zombies roam freely in cities and towns. Small groups of survivors exist, but most are hostile. Food, clean water, medicine, ammo, and fuel are hard to find.

I’ve been looking for about 30 minutes for a good furry zombie apocalypse rpg, and I couldn’t find one 😔 (I did, but no proxy) so, being the generous man I am, I created this masterpiece

Original bot

Discord server on my profile :3

Update 1.1: added inventory and ui system, plus stats
